evals.prompt: Decompose the notification preferences PRD into user stories. Requirements: per-channel toggles, SecurityAlert minimum-one-channel rule, pause-all functionality.
evals.expected_output: INVEST-quality user stories, explicit business rules, domain terms identified for glossary
expectations: At least 4 user stories (toggle, view, SecurityAlert constraint, pause)
Business rules extracted: BR-001 SecurityAlert minimum one channel
Domain terms identified: NotificationCategory, NotificationChannel, NotificationPreference

evals.prompt: Identify domain terms from: 'Users can pay for orders using credit cards. Payments can be refunded within 30 days. Disputed payments trigger a chargeback process.'
evals.expected_output: Domain terms with definitions, distinction between Refund and Chargeback
expectations: Identifies: Payment, Refund, Dispute, Chargeback, CreditCard/PaymentMethod
Each term has a clear business-language definition
Distinction between Refund (merchant-initiated) and Chargeback (bank-initiated) noted
Terms marked for addition to shared/glossary.md
